description: Promise text matches, in-turn evidence present, watcher independently verified, task-anchor fully done -> the loop stops cleanly (no re-feed, no handoff).

harness_invocation.cwd: this fixture's .orchestrator/ tree copied into an isolated temp dir

notes: cleanup_and_stop() removes the scratchpad + done flags + watcher files and exits 0 with no stdout — this IS the converge success signal, not a printed verdict.
No HANDOFF.md is written on a fulfilled promise: a successful stop needs no cross-agent continuation artifact.
